name: The Foxy Animatronic Duo
description:
"We aren't some toys for you to play with!"

"I definitely am, not sure about my earlier model over there though~"

What's better than having two animatronics? Two of course! And look at that, you managed to get your hands on the both of them!

This is probably the last bot I'm gonna do before I do some on the requests form. Dont quote me on that though.
creator: RandomGold
